singleton_type_count: How many Scene icons have a type that appears exactly once?
How many icons in the Scene panel have a type that appears exactly once?
Count the Scene icons whose type appears exactly once.
How many Scene icons are the only icon of their type?
What is the number of Scene icons with a type that appears exactly once?
most_frequent_type_count: How many Scene icons belong to the most frequent type?
How many icons in the Scene panel are of the most frequent type?
Count the Scene icons whose type is the unique most frequent type.
What is the number of Scene icons in the unique most frequent type?
How many Scene icons share the type that appears most often?
most_frequent_type_label: Which marked icon type appears most often in the image?
Which marked icon type is shown the most times?
Choose the marked icon type that appears most frequently.
Which marked type has the largest number of icons?
Which marked icon type occurs most often?
least_frequent_type_label: Which marked icon type appears least often in the image?
Which marked icon type is shown the fewest times?
Choose the marked icon type that appears least frequently.
Which marked type has the smallest number of icons?
Which marked icon type occurs least often?

global.answer_hint: set "answer" to the count as an integer

query:singleton_type_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] bounding boxes in image pixel coordinates for every counted icon

query:most_frequent_type_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] bounding boxes in image pixel coordinates for every counted icon of the unique most frequent type

query:most_frequent_type_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the option letter on the marked icon type that appears most often
query:most_frequent_type_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] bounding boxes in image pixel coordinates for every icon of the selected marked type, including the marked representative

query:least_frequent_type_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the option letter on the marked icon type that appears least often
query:least_frequent_type_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] bounding boxes in image pixel coordinates for every icon of the selected marked type, including the marked representative
